name: ui_logic
description: CYD UI layer (screens, widgets, view bindings; design.md 12-24). The profile editor (C5) and the fault overlay (C8) validate/annotate against the shared nanopb wire contract, so a ui_logic source includes the generated oven.pb.h — this dependency is what puts nanopb's generated-src on this library's include path (the lib/protocol pattern). LVGL is resolved from the env lib_deps.
